name: Swedish Meatballs W/Homemade Meatballs & Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 container meatballs made with homemade meatball mix, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine white sauce mix and beef broth.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
3. Add mushrooms and nutmeg.
4. Stir in meatballs and continue cooking until heated through.
5. Meanwhile, prepare noodles according to package directions.
6. Serve the Swedish meatballs in sauce over hot drained noodles.
Makes 4-6 servings.
